scripts.build: bun run --filter @skyline-ts/core build && bun run --filter '@skyline-ts/imessage' --filter '@skyline-ts/slack' --filter '@skyline-ts/whatsapp' --filter '@skyline-ts/whatsapp-business' --filter '@skyline-ts/terminal' build && bun run --filter skyline-ts build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @skyline-ts/core typecheck && bun run --filter @skyline-ts/core build && bun run --filter '@skyline-ts/imessage' --filter '@skyline-ts/slack' --filter '@skyline-ts/whatsapp' --filter '@skyline-ts/whatsapp-business' --filter '@skyline-ts/terminal' typecheck && bun run --filter '@skyline-ts/imessage' --filter '@skyline-ts/slack' --filter '@skyline-ts/whatsapp' --filter '@skyline-ts/whatsapp-business' --filter '@skyline-ts/terminal' build && bun run --filter skyline-ts typecheck
scripts.release: cd packages/skyline-ts && bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish --access public
